mapper.sql: fsqt.col_name_chn, fsqt.col_name, fsqt.type, fsqt.employee_id, fsqt.id, fsqt.create_time, fsqt.create_by, fsqt.update_time, fsqt.update_by, fsqt.search_user_id

${tAlias}.col_name_chn as ${tAlias}_col_name_chn, ${tAlias}.col_name as ${tAlias}_col_name, ${tAlias}.type as ${tAlias}_type, ${tAlias}.employee_id as ${tAlias}_employee_id, ${tAlias}.id as ${tAlias}_id, ${tAlias}.create_time as ${tAlias}_create_time, ${tAlias}.create_by as ${tAlias}_create_by, ${tAlias}.update_time as ${tAlias}_update_time, ${tAlias}.update_by as ${tAlias}_update_by, ${tAlias}.search_user_id as ${tAlias}_search_user_id

select
, pe.name as name, pe.work_card as work_card from fnd_super_query_temp fsqt join pm_employee pe on pe.id = fsqt.employee_id and pe.enabled_flag = 1
mapper.insert: insert into fnd_super_query_temp (col_name_chn, col_name, type, employee_id, create_time, create_by, update_time, update_by, search_user_id) values (#{colNameChn,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{colName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{type,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{employeeId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{searchUserId, jdbcType = BIGINT})
mapper.update: update fnd_super_query_temp set col_name_chn = #{colNameChn,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, col_name = #{colName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, type = #{type,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, employee_id = #{employeeId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, search_user_id = #{searchUserId, jdbcType = BIGINT} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.insert:
insert into fnd_super_query_temp (col_name_chn, col_name, type, employee_id, create_time, create_by, update_time, update_by, search_user_id) values
(#{item.colNameChn,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.colName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.type,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.employeeId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, getdate(), -1, getdate(), -1, #{item.searchUserId, jdbcType = BIGINT})
mapper.delete: delete from fnd_super_query_temp where search_user_id = #{searchUserId, jdbcType =BIGINT}

sql.foreach:
SELECT data_tmp.table_name, data_tmp.table_description, data_tmp.source_id, cross_tmp.column_name, cross_tmp.column_id, cross_tmp.column_val, cross_tmp.column_description FROM ${table.tableAbbreviation}_tmp_${table.id} AS data_tmp CROSS apply (VALUES
('${column.alias}', data_tmp.${column.alias},
('${column.columnName}', data_tmp.${column.columnName},
${column.id}, '${column.columnDescription}')
) AS cross_tmp (column_name, column_val, column_id, column_description)
